tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
edit 1
set name "BLOCK_C2"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "ATTACKER_C2"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic enable
set nat disable
next
end"}

show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 1

        set srcintf "port2"

        set uuid 27d4bd92-2915-51f1-7696-cc83b0638558

        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
